name: messages_send
description: Send a message via the unified Messages API across any supported channel (SMS, WhatsApp, Viber, RCS, etc.) with a single endpoint. Automatically selects the appropriate channel based on the message configuration.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: Array of message objects to send.

parameters.name: messages[].sender
parameters.description: Sender ID or phone number for the message.

parameters.name: messages[].destinations
parameters.description: Array of destination objects with 'to' field containing recipient identifiers.

parameters.name: messages[].content
parameters.description: Message content object. Structure depends on channel and message type.
